notes: Smoke confirms importing W3 v7 migration fixture replaces the prior W1 document registry instead of leaving the 64-doc side store visible.
The two legacy PDFs are visible after import; the orphan file is preserved by migration, though the current UI does not provide a dedicated orphan-discovery/recovery surface.
This browser smoke complements the unit golden that asserts the orphan attachment retains the original orphan node ID.
